creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 181174
svn diff for graphics/uniconvertor

OK I use this, and discovered it was marked BROKEN.
I found their new site, and made all the necessary changes.
Went to build && install. But it barfed at sk1libs right
at the finish line.

So I attempted to also fix sk1libs, but fell short of time.
Submitted a patch that should work, but unable to fully test --
see pr 218102 for further details.

All in all the attached patch should work fine. Hope
this helps!

--Chris
